name: super-spec
description: Spec-driven development workflow for Claude Code. 5 phases (SPEC/DISCUSS/PLAN/EXECUTE/VERIFY), 3 tiers, fixed per-role model map, 4 execution styles, EXECUTE concurrency ladder (subagent/team/workflow by DAG width), optional graphify codebase mapping, user-gate verification flow, Ralph remediation loop, dynamic-workflow fan-out acceleration.
